zh.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Savile是Henry Savile和Elizabeth de Thornhill的兒子，於1381年出生在英國越可爾米基利。他於1409年與Margaret Pilkington結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1449年12月16日在他的家鄉享年68歲，埋葬在英國越可爾米基利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Savile是Henry Savile和Elizabeth de Thornhill的儿子，于1381年出生在英国越可爾米基利。他于1409年与Margaret Pilkington结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1449年12月16日在他的家乡享年68岁，埋葬在英国越可爾米基利。

nameMeanings.name: Savile
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Saville
meanings: English (of Norman origin; Yorkshire): habitational name from a place in northern France of which the identity is not clear, though it is probably Sainville in Eure-et-Loire, so called from Old French saisne ‘Saxon’ + ville ‘settlement’. Compare Savel , Savell , and Savelle .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Savile was born in 1381, in Midgley, Yorkshire, England as the son of Henry Savile and Elizabeth de Thornhill. He married Margaret Pilkington in 1409. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died on 16 December 1449, in his hometown, at the age of 68, and was buried in Midgley, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Savile est né en 1381, à Midgley, Everwyck, Angleterre, fils de Henry Savile et Elizabeth de Thornhill. Il a épousé Margaret Pilkington en 1409. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 16 décembre 1449, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Midgley, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Savile wurde 1381 in Midgley, Yorkshire, England, als Sohn von Henry Savile und Elizabeth de Thornhill geboren. Er hat 1409 Margaret Pilkington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 16. Dezember 1449 im Alter von 68 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Midgley, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Savile è nato il nel 1381 nel Midgley, Yorkshire, England come figlio di Henry Savile e Elizabeth de Thornhill. Lui sposato Margaret Pilkington nel 1409. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 16 dicembre 1449, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Midgley, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Savileは1381年にイギリスヨークシュアイアミドグリーでHenry SavileとElizabeth de Thornhillの息子として生まれた。1409年にMargaret Pilkingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1449年12月16日に故郷で68歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアミドグリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Savile(은)는 1381년 영국 요르크실르 미지리에서 Henry Savile(와)과 Elizabeth de Thornhill의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1409년 Margaret Pilkington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1449년 12월 16일 그의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 미지리에 묻혔다.

mn.Thornhill, York, England: Thornhill, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Savile nasceu em 1381, em Midgley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra filho de Henry Savile e Elizabeth de Thornhill. Ele casou-se com Margaret Pilkington em 1409. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de dezembro de 1449, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Midgley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Savile родился в 1381 г. в местности миджли, еркшир, Англия. Его родителей звали Henry Savile и Elizabeth de Thornhill. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Pilkington в 1409 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер 16 декабря 1449 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности миджли, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Savile nació en 1381, en Midgley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Henry Savile y Elizabeth de Thornhill. Se casó con Margaret Pilkington en 1409. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 16 de diciembre de 1449, en su pueblo, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Midgley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
